properties.displayName: GENMINMDATP EX-AV-052-1204.002 Incidente múltiple de criticidad MEDIA
properties.description: Se detectan varios eventos de criticidad media en un host en 1 hora.
properties.query:
//Modifica nombre de la alerta, por la alerta a excluir
let watchlist_EX_AV_052_RuleException = _GetWatchlist('watchlist_EX_AV_052_RuleException') | project SearchKey;
SecurityAlert
| where ProviderName == 'MDATP'
| where AlertSeverity == 'Medium'
| where Status == 'New'
| where AlertName !in (watchlist_EX_AV_052_RuleException)
| summarize count() by CompromisedEntity
| where count_ >= 4
| join kind=inner (SecurityAlert
    | where ProviderName == 'MDATP'
    | where AlertSeverity == 'Medium'
    | where Status == 'New')
    on CompromisedEntity
//| lookup kind=leftouter _GetWatchlist('watchlist_Device_Asset_Inventory') on $left.CompromisedEntity == $right.Host
| project TimeGenerated, EventCount = count_, EventType = DisplayName, ThreatName = AlertName, ThreatRef = AlertType, DvcHostname = CompromisedEntity, EventMessage = Description, EventVendor = VendorName, EventProduct = ProviderName, EventReportUrl = AlertLink, EventOriginalUid = VendorOriginalId, ConfidenceScore, IsIncident, EventStartTime = StartTime, EventEndTime = EndTime, Entities, DvcAction = Status, Tactics, Techniques, SubTechniques, ExtendedProperties
